title: High-End Fashion Campaign Typography Poster
sourceTitle: Typographic Fashion Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end fashion campaign typography poster for surreal midnight fragrance launch by Vellum Atelier, with SOFT SKIN RITUAL as the structural campaign anchor. Subject: midnight glass fragrance bottle with Vellum Atelier label and mirrored silver cap becomes the hero product, model, or campaign subject while NOVA PETCARE defines the brand brief without changing the fixed luxury editorial visual system. Scene: Premium fashion campaign environment with controlled negative space, polished studio atmosphere, and supporting campaign detail AUTUMN EDITION 2026 placed only where small typography belongs. Composition: Fixed vertical editorial poster structure with oversized typography acting as the layout architecture, strong hierarchy, deliberate spacing, realistic fashion/product photography, and one finished poster only. Signature Elements: Oversized cut-up or layered letterforms, strong visual hierarchy, negative space, fashion/product hero focus, refined campaign styling, and magazine-quality finish. Style: Luxury editorial poster and magazine-style fashion campaign visual with structural type, refined art direction, realistic photography, premium retouching, and high-end brand presentation. Color Palette: Fixed premium fashion-campaign palette: deep blacks or warm editorial neutrals, ivory type, champagne or silver highlights, and restrained accent color tied to the source luxury mood. Lighting: Refined campaign lighting with clean facial or product highlights, believable shadows, polished depth, and controlled contrast suitable for premium fashion advertising. Typography: SOFT SKIN RITUAL is the main oversized readable headline; A FRAGRANCE BUILT IN SHADOW appears as the secondary campaign line; Vellum Atelier and AUTUMN EDITION 2026 stay short, crisp, and integrated into the editorial grid. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Typographic Fashion Campaign Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end fashion campaign typography poster for sculptural skincare product hero by Lumia Skin, with GLOW IN STRUCTURE as the structural campaign anchor. Subject: frosted glass serum bottle with a poised adult model becomes the hero product, model, or campaign subject while LUMIA SCENT defines the brand brief without changing the fixed luxury editorial visual system. Scene: Premium fashion campaign environment with controlled negative space, polished studio atmosphere, and supporting campaign detail NEW SERUM LAUNCH placed only where small typography belongs. Composition: Fixed vertical editorial poster structure with oversized typography acting as the layout architecture, strong hierarchy, deliberate spacing, realistic fashion/product photography, and one finished poster only. Signature Elements: Oversized cut-up or layered letterforms, strong visual hierarchy, negative space, fashion/product hero focus, refined campaign styling, and magazine-quality finish. Style: Luxury editorial poster and magazine-style fashion campaign visual with structural type, refined art direction, realistic photography, premium retouching, and high-end brand presentation. Color Palette: Fixed premium fashion-campaign palette: deep blacks or warm editorial neutrals, ivory type, champagne or silver highlights, and restrained accent color tied to the source luxury mood. Lighting: Refined campaign lighting with clean facial or product highlights, believable shadows, polished depth, and controlled contrast suitable for premium fashion advertising. Typography: GLOW IN STRUCTURE is the main oversized readable headline; PRECISION SKINCARE FOR EVERY DAY appears as the secondary campaign line; Lumia Skin and NEW SERUM LAUNCH stay short, crisp, and integrated into the editorial grid. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
